description: 1 layer, 4 heads. Attention gathers A_i and B_i to residual slots; MLP computes (A_i+B_i) mod 10 via 100 one-hot AND-units. No carry handling; p=11 fallback forces leading digit '0'.

3 blocks, 16 heads. Block 0 gathers 10 digits via per-slot attention heads and computes generate/propagate bits + both carry-in candidates for each digit position. Block 1 runs a carry-lookahead OR over disjoint p_*...g_* paths (15 hidden units). Block 2 multiplexes the two candidates by the computed carry and position-selects the digit. No LayerNorm; sharp attention via SCALE=50.
Same circuit as CarryLookaheadRipple but with d_ff=512 (block 0 uses 500 of 512 hidden units; blocks 1-2 use 15 and 92). ~halves MLP params.

Compact rewrite of CarryLookaheadRipple: d_model=160 (vs 256), n_heads=10, 3 blocks. Block 0 gathers 10 input digits via 10 heads and computes g_i, p_i (generate/propagate). Block 1 OR-sums disjoint p*...g carry-lookahead paths (15 hidden units). Block 2 directly emits (A_{k-1}+B_{k-1}+c_k) mod 10 with 902 AND-units indexed by (pos, a, b, c_k) -- no carry-candidate storage needed in the residual stream.
